Wähle hier die Hauptliste (UUID-Ordner): Select the main list (UUID folder) of your Bring! instance where the items will be written.
Diese IDs verknüpfen den Adapter mit dem: These IDs link the adapter with the Alexa2 adapter to intercept new purchases.
Der Ordner deiner Alexa-Einkaufsliste (z: The folder of your Alexa shopping list (e.g. alexa2.0.Lists.SHOP)
Der Datenpunkt für den gesprochenen Text: The datapoint for the spoken text (e.g. alexa2.0.History.summary)
The datapoint for the Alexa response (e.g. alexa2.0.History.answerText)
Der Datenpunkt für die Seriennummer des: The datapoint for the serial number of the addressed Echo (e.g. alexa2.0.History.serialNumber)
Trage hier deine Lieblingsrezepte ein. W:
Enter your favorite recipes here. If you add the recipe name via Alexa, the individual ingredients stored here will automatically be added to the shopping list.

Example:
Name: Cake
Ingredients: Flour, Eggs, Sugar
Zutaten (kommagetrennt, z.B. Mehl, Eier,: Ingredients (comma separated, e.g. flour, eggs, milk)
Hier kannst du festlegen, dass bestimmte:
Here you can define that certain words should be replaced before they are sent to Bring.

Examples:
1. Original: Tissues ➔ Replacement: Paper towels
2. Original: Choc ➔ Replacement: Chocolate
Hier kannst du erweiterte Logs aktiviere: Here you can enable extended logs if you want to check exactly what the adapter is doing.
Erweiterte Debug-Logs direkt ins normale: Write extended debug logs directly into the normal info log
